job_description:
# Senior Health Data Analyst - Payer
Company: Veeva Systems
Source: Official company posting via Lever
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://jobs.lever.co/veeva/eecae310-1622-4e2f-bc33-24c603c53034

## Highlights
- Remote role on the Compass Product Team.
- Focus on payer source data, data quality, governance, and cross-functional delivery.
- Requires healthcare data experience, including payer data and SQL.
strengths: Cross-functional collaboration with QA and engineering

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | Payer Data Analyst | SQL | Data Quality & Governance
replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and improving payer-oriented data across claims, member, provider, and reporting workflows. Deep expertise in advanced SQL, source-to-target validation, data quality controls, and enterprise healthcare reporting. Strong fit for roles requiring payer data stewardship, governance-minded quality checks, and close collaboration across analytics, product, QA, and engineering.
replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.

replacements.replace: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, data quality rule design, root-cause analysis, defect triage, lineage-aware validation
replacements.find: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, root-cause analysis, defect triage

replacements.replace: Medical claims, member eligibility, provider data, payer operations, healthcare reporting, HIPAA awareness, EDI familiarity
replacements.find: Medical claims, member eligibility, provider data, payer operations, HIPAA awareness, EDI familiarity

replacements.replace: Validated 60+ ETL workflows across Informatica and Azure Data Factory feeding enterprise healthcare reporting and analytics platforms—covering claims, member eligibility, provider, and payer-operations data for multi-million-member BCBS populations.
replacements.find: Validated 60+ ETL workflows across Informatica and Azure Data Factory feeding enterprise healthcare reporting and analytics platforms—covering claims, member eligibility, provider, and payer-operations data supporting multi-million-member BCBS populations.

replacements.replace: Authored 200+ advanced SQL queries for source-to-target reconciliation across 100M+ claim and member records, surfacing mismatches and strengthening payer-data accuracy across major releases.
replacements.find: Authored 200+ advanced SQL queries (multi-table joins, window functions, CTEs) for source-to-target reconciliation across 100M+ claim and member records, reducing release-blocking defects by ~30% across major releases.

replacements.replace: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules—covering record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic—to standardize data quality checks and governance-oriented validation.
replacements.find: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules—covering record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic—adopted across the QA team to standardize testing and reduce ramp time for new analysts.

replacements.replace: Contributed to data quality and reporting accuracy initiatives that reduced post-release data hotfixes by ~25% and improved stakeholder trust in payer-operations dashboards, downstream KPIs, and governed healthcare datasets.
replacements.find: Contributed to data quality and reporting accuracy initiatives that reduced post-release data hotfixes by ~25% and improved stakeholder trust in payer-operations dashboards and downstream KPIs.

gaps: Posting emphasizes payer reference data governance more than ETL testing
Python is listed as developing rather than deep production use
notes: High-priority full-time target. Tailoring focuses on payer data, governance, reconciliation, and large-scale healthcare validation.
validation_notes: posting date could not be verified
